'''rawïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okinaxobin|okinaxobin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okinaxobin|okinaxobin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| rawïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ræwïfzïfth || ræwïfzïfj || ræwïfzïfsh || ræwïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rawïfwïfzïfth || rawïfwïfzïfj || rawïfwïfzïfsh || rawïfwïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rawïfzïfth || rawïfzïfj || rawïfzïfsh || rawïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rawïffzïffth || rawïffzïffj || rawïffzïffsh || rawïffzïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || rawïfzïfïf || rawïfzïfïf || rawïfzïfïf || rawïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || rawïfzïfth || rawïfzïfj || rawïfzïfsh || rawïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || rawïfzïfïfl || rawïfzïfïfl || rawïfzïfïfl || rawïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || rawïfzïfïfïf || rawïfzïfïfïf || rawïfzïfïfïf || rawïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || rawïfzïfïfn || rawïfzïfïfn || rawïfzïfïfn || rawïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || rawïfzïfïforo || rawïfzïfïforo || rawïfzïfïforo || rawïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
